brand.name: Shutterly
brand.blurb: Learn to see light, frame stories and build a portfolio you're proud of — from the Cape to the Karoo, the kalkbaai to the kraal.

marketing.trustline: No paywall. No upsell. Just photography taught properly.
marketing.featureTitle: Built for makers, not gear lists
marketing.feature1Body: Every lesson teaches you to see — not just to set a dial. Photographs that mean something, every time.
marketing.feature2Body: Aperture, shutter and ISO simulators let you feel exposure before you ever lift a camera.
marketing.feature3Body: Examples shot from Muizenberg to Mapungubwe. Lessons in English and Afrikaans, side by side.
marketing.feature4Body: Shoot the brief, upload your frame, earn badges. The gallery is the syllabus.
marketing.modulesSubtitle: Eight modules. Real briefs. A portfolio at the end of it.
marketing.finalCtaTitle: Pick up the camera. We'll do the rest.
marketing.finalCtaBody: Create a free account and your first lesson is unlocked instantly.

dashboard.empty: Nothing here yet — your dashboard fills up as you learn.

challenges.title: Photo challenges
challenges.subtitle: A fresh brief every week. Submit your frame, earn the badge.
challenges.uploadHint: JPG or PNG up to {max} MB.

auth.name: Full name
auth.agreeTerms: I agree to the terms of use and privacy policy.
auth.checkInbox: Check your inbox for a reset link.

wizard.title: Shutterly Launch Wizard
wizard.subtitle: A private checklist that walks you from blank slate to launch day.
wizard.warnIncomplete: Some steps are still missing. Finish them before you publish.
